rationale: Precise real-time funding rates, open interest, and correlation coefficients for AVAX require authenticated API access or paid tiers on Coinglass, CoinGecko Pro, or similar platforms — none of these specific computed metrics are served on freely browsable public pages without login/API key as of mid-2025.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/funding/AVAX — Funding rate & OI page EXISTS but live numeric data requires account/API; public page renders values via authenticated JS calls not scrapable as free static data.
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/avalanche — Price history available free but 30-day correlation coefficients vs BTC/ETH/NASDAQ are NOT pre-computed or exposed on the free public page.
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — Provides market-wide sentiment only, not AVAX-specific derivatives data.
https://defillama.com/chain/Avalanche — TVL and chain metrics only; no derivatives positioning data.

notes.funding_rate_8h: Coinglass public page (coinglass.com/funding/AVAX) displays this but the value is loaded dynamically via a credentialed API endpoint. No static free-tier scrape is reliable.
notes.open_interest_usd: Same constraint as funding rate — Coinglass and CoinMarketCap derivatives pages gate live OI behind accounts.
notes.correlations: 30-day rolling Pearson correlations vs BTC, ETH, and NASDAQ require downloading OHLC time-series and computing locally. Raw AVAX price data is free on CoinGecko (/coins/avalanche/market_chart?vs_currency=usd&days=30), BTC/ETH similarly free, but NASDAQ (^IXIC) requires Yahoo Finance or FRED — computation must be done client-side; no source publishes the finished coefficient for free.
